economic_notes: First Nation has investments in multiple limited partnerships including Lhai Ventures LP (22.5% - forestry/resources), Endako Tsey LP (49%), Chundo Yus Real Estate LP (99.99%), Chundo Yus Forestry LP (99.99%), NWF Resources LP (49.5%). Tse Yaz Bunket Gas Bar Ltd. (formerly Chundo Yus Forestry General Partner Ltd.) consolidated as subsidiary after reclassification from GBE. On-reserve housing loan program of $2,000,000 and Treasury Risk Management Facility of $1,440,000. Contaminated site undergoing remediation.
notes: Fiscal year 2022 (year ended March 31, 2022). Total government transfers calculated as ISC $4,409,300 + Province of BC $3,081,967 + First Nations Health Authority $464,298 + First Nations Education Steering Committee $115,721 + Carrier Sekani Family Services $394,109 + Carrier Sekani Tribal Council $1,413,666 = approx $9,879,061 from segmented schedule; however statement of earnings groups Other aboriginal groups at $2,535,668 which includes CSFN, CSTC, FNESC. OSR reported as per revenue line. No schedule of remuneration included in document. current_liabilities estimated from accounts payable $557,486 + due to government agencies $92,271 + bank indebtedness $1,387 = $651,144. Tse Yaz Bunket Gas Bar Ltd. (100% owned) is the one fully consolidated subsidiary. Eight entities accounted for by modified equity method as GBEs/government business partnerships. Ottawa Trust Fund balance of $1,300,401 included in accumulated surplus. Deferred revenue was fully recognized in 2022 (nil balance vs $629,866 prior year).
